Shield of the White Dragon  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
AC: 25
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10 CHA: +10 AGI: -5
SV FIRE: +5 SV DISEASE: +5 SV COLD: +40 SV MAGIC: +5 SV POISON: +5
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD DRU BRD ROG SHM
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Farming vs. Questing
QuoteReply
# May 09 2004 at 10:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966324878
4 posts
Too bad so many want to farm instead of Quest anymore... Farmers have the Dragon locked up on MM server!
Could there be any chance that the farmer will read this and have pity on the few of us that are still playing EQ for the Quest?

Bradford, level 53 Ranger, MM server

I have one for sale

# Jun 09 2003 at 12:23 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591788269762
36 posts
Im selling one of these on ayonae ro for only 5k. its nice shield 40sv cold great for raids, anyways send tells to Waywren or Glowdon if ur interested, price somewhat negociable and will take trades.
send me a tell on ayonae ro!!!

Dont really bother
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2003 at 7:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780603635
14 posts
You shouldnt really bother with this shield, yea it only costs 10k but for the extra 2k or so you can go get a Lodi Shield which IMO is much better.

Dont really bother

__DEL__1592253736135
19 posts
as more ManaBurn Wizard groups form on the various servers, and as these MB groups farm the kunark dragons (they barely last an hour upon popping on terris-thule) the market should be flooded w/ most kunark dragon loot. i wouldn't pay more than 10k for one of these now.

Resists
QuoteReply
# Aug 01 2001 at 11:14 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Sarnak Battle shield does not have FORTY (40) cold resist. This shield may not be the best, but it's worth whipping out for cold AE's if you have something better normally.

▲ Page top
All I want to know is...
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2001 at 10:02 PM Rating: Default
Ashwith
Sage
84 posts
... why is the Shield of the White dragon the color red?

-= Ashwith "No This is Not a Turtle Shield" Fairfever
▲ Page top
RE: All I want to know is...
QuoteReply
# Aug 01 2001 at 7:46 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591757142046
37 posts
Because it is the 'Shield of the White Dragon', not the 'White Shield of the Dragon'. It can be any color it wants.
▲ Page top
not that wonderful
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2001 at 9:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764316439
7 posts
IMO i think this could have been much better considering what you have to go through to get it. Look at the sarnak battle shield with the same Ac and a little less as far as str and saves go... sarnak takes a group to get, this shield takes 20 people minimum to get. i woulda thought it would have been signifigantly better considering the challenge..

30k for the shield isn't that unreasonable IMHO.

▲ Page top
RE: not that wonderful
QuoteReply
# Sep 27 2002 at 8:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777778872
Scholar
78 posts
Actually I recently watched a single group of 6 level 60 wizzies take her down without much of a struggle...

I believe this was one of the items that popped at the time... and 30K is over the top for this shield... you could buy a lodizal shield for the same price with the added bonus of enduring breath for example...

Can't see this being sold for much over 10K these days...
